en_title: Subnautica 2 Has Sold So Well That Krafton Has to Pay That $250 Million Earnout to the Devs
cn_title: 《深海迷航2》大卖 Krafton支付2.5亿美元(约合人民币18亿元)激励金

paragraphs.en: Subnautica 2 has sold so well that publisher Krafton has reportedly agreed to pay a $250 million earnout to the developers — a bonus that was at the heart of its high-profile legal dispute with the fired Unknown Worlds leadership.
paragraphs.cn: 《深海迷航2》(Subnautica 2)销量惊人,发行商Krafton据报道已同意向开发团队支付2.5亿美元(约合人民币18亿元)的业绩对赌奖金。而这笔奖金正是Krafton与被解雇的Unknown Worlds管理层那场轰动业内的法律纠纷的核心争议焦点。

paragraphs.en: The underwater adventure has sold a mammoth 4 million copies since its early access launch on May 14, achieving more than 467,000 peak concurrent players on Steam. But its development was turbulent, with Krafton firing Unknown Worlds CEO Ted Gill and other senior team members in the summer of last year. At the time, Krafton said the game's launch had also been delayed — something it blamed on Gill — even though its team had been working towards an early access release that would have seen them eligible for that $250 million bonus.
paragraphs.cn: 这款水下冒险游戏自5月14日抢先体验上线以来已售出400万份,Steam峰值同时在线人数突破46.7万。但它的开发历程并不平静——Krafton去年夏天解雇了Unknown Worlds的CEO泰德·吉尔(Ted Gill)及其他几位核心成员。当时Krafton表示游戏发售也被推迟,并把锅甩给了吉尔,即便其团队当时正全力冲刺一个能让他们拿到这笔2.5亿美元奖金的抢先体验发售目标。

paragraphs.en: Gill and his former teammates immediately launched a lawsuit against Krafton, suggesting they were ousted to avoid that bonus being paid, while Krafton hit back and said the staff had "resorted to litigation to demand a multimillion-dollar payout they haven't earned." Krafton also accused the staff it fired of having stolen documents in anticipation of subsequent legal action.
paragraphs.cn: 吉尔和他的前同事们随即起诉Krafton,指控Krafton是为了逃避支付这笔奖金而把他们扫地出门。Krafton则反诉,称被解雇的员工是「诉诸诉讼来索取他们根本没赚到的数百万美元报酬」。Krafton还指控被解雇者预谋诉讼,提前盗取了公司文件,使得双方分手的过程更加扑朔迷离。

paragraphs.en: In March, Krafton was ordered to reinstate Gill and extend the proposed $250 million bonus to staff in one of the most dramatic legal rulings the video game industry has ever seen. And today, reports coming out of the South Korean business press indicate that Krafton has now agreed to pay the bonus.
paragraphs.cn: 今年3月,法庭做出了游戏行业历史上最具戏剧性的裁决之一——Krafton被裁定必须恢复吉尔的职位,并向员工兑现这笔2.5亿美元奖金。今日,韩国商业媒体的报道显示,Krafton已正式同意支付这笔款项。

paragraphs.en: According to estimates from Alinea Analytics, Subnautica 2 generated $100 million in just a week, and is 2026's fastest-selling Steam game so far. The Korean Economic Daily said Krafton now faces that $250 million bill after agreeing to pay $3.12 for every $1, or up to $250 million, to Unknown Worlds' former shareholders every time the studio's revenue topped $69.8 million a month since the Korean game developer acquired the U.S. firm in 2021. $250 million is equivalent to about 35% of Krafton's operating profit last year.
paragraphs.cn: 据Alinea Analytics分析,《深海迷航2》仅一周就创造了1亿美元(约合人民币7.16亿元)的收入,是2026年迄今Steam上销售最快的游戏。《韩国经济日报》报道,Krafton 2021年收购Unknown Worlds时签的协议规定:工作室每月营收超过6,980万美元(约合人民币5亿元)时,Krafton需以「每收1美元、付3.12美元」的比例向原股东支付奖金,上限2.5亿美元——这相当于Krafton去年营业利润的约35%。如今Krafton已不得不面对这笔账单。

paragraphs.en: IGN has asked Krafton for comment.

The legal battle between Krafton and the Unknown Worlds shareholders revealed a number of shocking revelations around the South Korean company's internal actions in the run up to Subnautica 2's release. For example, as internal projections showed Subnautica 2 looked on course to trigger the earnout, Krafton's chief executive, Changhan Kim, believed it was a "bad deal" and felt "taken advantage of," according to the ruling.
paragraphs.cn: 这场Krafton与Unknown Worlds股东之间的法律战揭露了Krafton在《深海迷航2》发售前一系列令人咋舌的内部操作。法庭裁决书显示,Krafton内部预测显示《深海迷航2》销量极有可能触发对赌条款时,Krafton CEO金昌汉(Changhan Kim)认为这是一笔「糟糕的交易」,觉得自己「被占了便宜」。

paragraphs.en: Kim was warned by his legal department that the earnout would still need to be paid even if there was a "dismissal with cause" of the Unknown Worlds' leadership. He was also warned it would expose Krafton to "lawsuit and reputation risk."
paragraphs.cn: 金被法务部警告,即使「以正当理由解雇」Unknown Worlds的管理层(联合创始人查理·克利夫兰(Charlie Cleveland)、马克斯·麦圭尔(Max McGuire)以及CEO泰德·吉尔),奖金仍然必须支付。法务还警告说,这一行为会让Krafton面临「诉讼和声誉风险」。

paragraphs.en: Kim then turned to ChatGPT, the AI-powered chatbot built by OpenAI, for help, vice-chancellor Lori Will of the court of chancery in Delaware said in the ruling. ChatGPT initially responded that the earnout would be "difficult to cancel," but later, at ChatGPT's suggestion, Kim formed an internal taskforce, dubbed Project X. "The task force's mandate was to either negotiate a 'deal' on the earnout or execute a 'Take Over' of Unknown Worlds," Will stated. "They looked to buy time."
paragraphs.cn: 特拉华州衡平法院副大法官洛丽·威尔(Lori Will)在裁决书中指出,金随后向OpenAI的AI聊天机器人ChatGPT求助。ChatGPT最初回复对赌奖金「很难取消」,但后来根据ChatGPT的建议,金在公司内部组建了一个代号「Project X」的特别小组。「这个小组的任务是要么谈判出一份关于对赌奖金的『交易』,要么对Unknown Worlds执行『接管』,」威尔写道,「他们试图争取时间。」

paragraphs.en: "Over the next month, Krafton followed most of ChatGPT's recommendations," Will wrote.
paragraphs.cn: 威尔写道:「在接下来的一个月里,Krafton几乎照搬了ChatGPT给出的大部分建议。」

opus_summary: 《深海迷航2》一周收入1亿美元(约人民币7.16亿元),Krafton被迫向Unknown Worlds原股东支付2.5亿美元(约人民币18亿元)对赌奖金,占其去年营业利润35%。法庭裁决书披露,Krafton CEO金昌汉曾向ChatGPT求助制定逃避奖金的「Project X」计划。
